name: Korey Brown
abilities: ★ A Tale as Old as Time — sooner or later he succumbs to slumber, most often face-up on the beach. The Open sets its watch by it; the tide takes it from there.
I Like Golf. A schoolteacher who just loves the game — that's the whole philosophy. Streaky as they come: net 3rd one year, dead last the next. Lends you his driver, too — don't break it.
caption: Korey Brown · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
